name: capgo-skills
description: Agent skills for Capgo and Capacitor mobile development.

plugins.name: capgo-cloud
plugins.description: Capgo cloud skills for CLI usage, live updates, hosted native builds, release management, and organization workflows.

plugins.name: app-growth
plugins.description: App growth and revenue skills for early subscription revenue, ASO, acquisition, paywalls, pricing, and churn learning.

plugins.name: capacitor-core
plugins.description: Core Capacitor skills for best practices, plugin selection, and MCP automation.

plugins.name: capacitor-features
plugins.description: Capacitor feature skills for deep links, keyboard handling, offline-first data, push notifications, and splash screens.

plugins.name: capacitor-ui
plugins.description: Mobile UI skills for Ionic, Konsta UI, Tailwind, and safe-area handling in Capacitor apps.

plugins.name: capacitor-quality
plugins.description: Capacitor quality skills for testing, debugging, logs, performance, accessibility, and security.

plugins.name: capacitor-deployment
plugins.description: Capacitor deployment skills for CI/CD, App Store publishing, Play Store publishing, and Apple review preflight checks.

plugins.name: capacitor-app-migrations
plugins.description: Migration skills for web apps, frameworks, Cordova, SPM, Appflow, Ionic Enterprise SDK, and SQLite alternatives.

plugins.name: capacitor-app-upgrades
plugins.description: Capacitor app upgrade skills for cross-version and major-version app migrations.

plugins.name: capacitor-plugin-dev

plugins.name: skill-authoring
